creator: jau@iki.fi
text:
Created attachment 233199
A sample of what I see on the display when trying to read https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Quaternion

Fails to show equations inline on wikipedia.org pages.
Try e.g.
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Quaternion


When one opens the right click menu and selects separately
"Open image in new tab" the equation is shown in the new
tab.
Similarly selection "Take screen shot" from the right click
menu renders the page properly in the PNG.

So, the equations can be rendered properly, but for some
reason firefox doesn't do it when the equation is intended
to be shown on the display between two text paragraphs.
